sessions.intent: Fix code analyzer findings from runtime2-builder-plan branch

before.assumptions: Code analyzer found 23 findings, 2 critical. Branch has existing test infrastructure. 3 pre-existing test failures.
before.risk: Medium — touching Data.Value getter, foreach iteration, condition orchestration are core runtime paths

sessions.plan: Address code analyzer findings: #1 foreach dict, #2 condition guard, #4 Data.Value instability, #5 ResolveDeep mutation, #9 list POCO support, #17 reflection cache, #18 headless hang, #20 Handled audit. Plus OBP cleanup of list modules to use Data throughout.

actions.context: #2: Moved orchestration guard from Context.Variables to Context._data with step-scoped keys. Prevents PLang dev override and inner goal collision.
#1/#9: Added EnumerateItems() yielding (Data, Data) pairs. #4: Data.Value getter now resolves once and caches. #17: Added reflection cache for As<T>() Resolve lookups.
#5: ResolveDeep now clones typed objects via MemberwiseClone before mutating string properties.
#1: Simplified to use Data.EnumerateItems(). Uses Put(item) with Data directly, no raw object extraction.
#9: Rewrote to use Data.EnumerateItems() + GetChild(). Removed ExtractProperty/ExtractKey helpers.
OBP cleanup: All read-only list actions now use Data navigation instead of reaching into .Value for raw IList/IDictionary.
#18: Headless/CI defaults to 'no' for app creation. Added App.Create property, wired --app={"create":true} in Executor.
#8: SetValue logs warning for JsonElement steps instead of silent no-op.
Removed deprecated Action.Return property and all references.
Added tests for condition guard isolation, dictionary key/value separation, ResolveDeep clone safety.
Removed broken StartGoal_LoadFromPrJson test (fixture file missing). Cleaned up Action.Return references from tests.

after.health: 2069 passed, 2 failed (pre-existing LLM tests), 0 new failures
after.notes: All 23 code analyzer findings addressed: 11 fixed, 1 audited clean, 1 skipped (justified), 10 acceptable/by-design. Major OBP improvement: list modules and foreach now work through Data interface, not raw CLR objects.
